title: Add round-trip property tests for ToBamlValue

description: [DSRs: crates/dspy-rs/src/rlm/submit.rs] Implement build_field_metas() function that collects flags and constraint results from parsed BamlValue into IndexMap<String, FieldMeta>.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 3.2): implement `build_field_metas` helper (inside SUBMIT module).
- Takes parsed `BamlValue` + checks/flags, populates `FieldMeta { raw_text, flags, checks }`.
- In plan, baml_bridge checks are not field-scoped, so store under `_root` key initially.
- Converts `ResponseCheck` into `ConstraintResult` with passed boolean.

title: Task 3.2: Implement build_field_metas helper
